title: Endpoint Central — continuous patch database expansion
summary: ManageEngine continues to expand the supported-vendor list in Endpoint Central's patch database, with regular additions covering newer third-party applications used across MSP customer fleets.
why_it_matters: Wider patch coverage means more of the third-party software running on your endpoints gets automatic patching — fewer manual exceptions for Technijian's tech team to chase.

title: Vulnerability management refinements
summary: Endpoint Central's vulnerability scoring and prioritization continue to incorporate exploited-in-the-wild signals, helping the MSP team triage which patches need to land first each month.
why_it_matters: Patches that protect against actively-exploited CVEs are surfaced earlier in the deployment queue, shrinking the window of exposure on your endpoints.
